articles.title: Nearly half of Americans surveyed don't know what America 250 commemorates - NPR
articles.description: A new national poll reveals a striking paradox in public sentiment ahead of America's 250th anniversary: a disconnect between Americans' strong patriotic pride and their lack of civic knowledge.
